summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29, 2026: Clear skies, pleasant spring evening, 15°C.)
summary.market: Market Update (Mar 29): S&P 500 down 7.4% for March, marking worst monthly performance in 12 months. Large-cap tech and Mag 7 under pressure due to de-risking and unrealistic AI earnings expectations. Recession probability per Moody's at 49%. Small-cap resilience noted.
summary.art: Art Market (Mar 29): Mixed signals. Bonhams' SE Asian auction saw 81% of lots sold above estimate. The Met's Raphael retrospective opened. Controversy persists at Sydney Biennale with major sponsor withdrawals.

system.raw: Dashboard auto-refresh (6:50 PM): Significant market decline for March confirmed. Art sector navigating institutional controversy and auction activity.
